full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Understand and explain the core architecture of ECTS in stepwise form.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Explain ECTS from the IJCAI 2009 paper in 5 clear steps with paper-linked terminology (1NN, MPL, clusters, support).
full_llm_interaction_log.response_summary: Provided a step-by-step structure for ECTS and clarified how MPL and cluster support are used.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped convert paper reading into notebook-ready step blocks aligned with method flow.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I checked each step against the paper sections and terminology before finalizing markdown.
full_llm_interaction_log.why_important: This prompt formed the main structure of Task 1.1.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Clarify the difference between full-length 1NN baseline and ECTS behavior.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Differentiate full-length 1NN, early 1NN, and ECTS in concise terms suitable for exam notebook writing.
full_llm_interaction_log.response_summary: Summarized the roles of baseline 1NN, prefix decisions, and ECTS cluster-level robustness.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Improved precision in comparing baseline and proposed method.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I retained only distinctions explicitly supported by the paper text.
full_llm_interaction_log.why_important: Helped avoid generic explanation and stay paper-specific.
